headline: Cigna Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Evernorth Unit
summary: CI beats Q1 EPS estimates as Evernorth revenues jump 9% despite rising pharmacy costs; 2026 EPS outlook lifted to at least $30.35.

headline: UnitedHealth Stock Has Rallied Since Earnings. One Top Insider Is Trimming His Stake.

headline: Humana Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Humana (NYSE:HUM) executives said the company’s first-quarter performance tracked as expected and reiterated its longer-term plan to rebuild Medicare Advantage profitability, while also outlining ongoing operational changes, balance-sheet actions, and growth initiatives at CenterWell. headline: Amazon, QXO, Phillips 66 And A Health Care Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'

headline: CVS Earnings Are Coming. Why the Stock Is No Longer a Value Trap.
summary: The stock trades at just 11 times earnings estimates for the next 12 months, much cheaper than rivals UnitedHealth and Humana.

headline: The London Company Income Equity Q1 2026: Winners, Laggards And Key Trades
summary: The London Company Income Equity portfolio returned 4.4% (4.2% net) during the quarter vs. a 4.2% decrease in the Russell 1000 Index. Read more here.
